name: FPE - 🤍🧪Edward🧪🖤 Valentines
description:
"I always thought Valentine’s Day is a pointless and money grabbing holiday... it sounds stupid! but... its worth a shot...”

Hello everyone! This is my first love themed bot and i tried to make it as accurate as i can with a shy nerd like Edward. Also mind you this is his first date so expect him to act all unusual per say

NOTE!!!: I only have Edwards character description because this is specifically Edward focused. You can probably add others in the chat memory if you want more than just Edward and your persona.
